data.title: design-conformance: prune 7 stale grandfathered baseline colors

data.body:
COLD REVIEW — PASS.

1. Diff (git diff master...HEAD -- scripts/design-conformance.baseline.json): EXACTLY 7 deletions, 0 additions. Removed lines: #3d4654 #4e5869 #5a6577 #6b7585 #7a8494 #d8dce2 #dde0e5. No other lines in the baseline changed. Only other file on branch is the plan file (expected).

2. Independent absence check: rg -i '3d4654|4e5869|5a6577|6b7585|7a8494|d8dce2|dde0e5' src --glob '!**/__tests__/**' => NO MATCHES. All 7 are genuinely absent from src. No risk of having dropped a still-live value.

3. Retained set: 28 grandfathered values remain. Spot-checked #ddb866/#e0c880 -> still present in src/components/three/OctahedronHero.tsx.

4. Gate: node scripts/design-conformance.mjs exits 0 — 'no net-new off-vocabulary colors (28 grandfathered values; 19 sanctioned tokens).'

Verdict: PASS. Pure subtractive prune of dead grandfathered entries; gate green; coverage shrunk only by values no longer referenced anywhere in src.
